name: Neon Ronin #001
description: A masterless samurai cloaked in a rain-soaked trench coat, his katana humming with electric blue plasma. Holographic cherry blossoms drift across a neon Tokyo skyline behind him.

name: Neon Ronin #014
description: A cybernetic warrior with a chrome jaw and glowing red optics, gripping a vibroblade. Steam rises from grated streets lit by flickering pink signage.

name: Neon Ronin #042
description: A stealthy assassin in a black bodysuit threaded with circuitry, twin daggers crackling with violet energy. She crouches on a rooftop above a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis.

name: Neon Ronin #077
description: A battle-worn mercenary with a glowing prosthetic arm and a heavy plasma cannon. Sparks and embers fill the air around a burning industrial district.

name: Neon Ronin #103
description: A wandering swordsman bathed in soft teal light, his simple blade reflecting the glow of distant skyscrapers. A quiet, contemplative warrior under a digital moon.

name: Pastel Critter #210
description: An impossibly fluffy lavender bunny with oversized sparkling eyes, nestled in a bed of cotton-candy clouds. Soft, dreamy, and unbearably adorable.

name: Pastel Critter #233
description: A tiny mint-green kitten with a pastel pink bow, batting at floating bubbles. Round cheeks and a gentle, sleepy smile make it the cutest creature in the meadow.

name: Pastel Critter #251
description: A chubby peach-colored hamster wearing a tiny crown, surrounded by floating hearts and sprinkles. The rarest and most regal of the cuddly companions.

name: Pastel Critter #288
description: A baby blue puppy with floppy ears and a soft glittery coat, chasing pastel butterflies through a field of marshmallow flowers.

name: Ancient Relic #007
description: A weathered golden amulet inscribed with forgotten runes, pulsing with a faint inner light. Said to channel the power of a long-dead sun god.

name: Ancient Relic #019
description: A cracked obsidian dagger wrapped in decaying leather, its blade etched with the sigil of an extinct cult. Cold to the touch and humming with dark energy.

name: Ancient Relic #033
description: A simple clay tablet covered in spiraling cuneiform, chronicling a flood that drowned an empire. Plain, fragile, and priceless to scholars.

name: Ancient Relic #044
description: A silver chalice encrusted with sapphires, brimming with a liquid that never evaporates. Legend claims a single sip grants visions of the future.

name: Neon Ronin #156
description: An armored general clad in glowing crimson nano-plates, commanding a legion from atop a hovering platform. His energy naginata splits the smog-filled sky.

name: Pastel Critter #299
description: A sleepy yellow duckling curled inside a teacup, tiny bubbles floating from its beak. The picture of soft, harmless comfort.
